status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Create repo harness and static baseline
features.description: Required harness files exist, startup rules are clear, and static validation runs without live Cloudflare mutations.
features.user_visible_behavior: Agents can start, verify, and resume work safely in the cf-controller repo.
evidence: 2026-06-06 harness scaffold exists: AGENTS.md, init.sh, feature_list.json, session-handoff.md
2026-06-06 init.sh baseline updated to validate feature_list.json instead of missing app.py path
features.notes: Repo contract established. Linear backlog sync tracked by NCD-28.

features.title: Terraform Cloudflare DNS baseline
features.description: Wildcard and apex A records for the homelab zone are defined in Terraform with proxied records.
features.user_visible_behavior: Operators can plan and apply DNS records for the Cloudflare zone from code.
verification: terraform validate succeeds with credentials injected by tf.sh
plan shows wildcard and apex A records only
evidence: 2026-06-05 commit 5080f5a added Cloudflare DNS management with Terraform
terraform/cloudflared/main.tf defines cloudflare_dns_record wildcard and host resources
features.notes: Live apply status not recorded in harness yet.

features.title: Terraform Cloudflare zone security settings
features.description: TLS 1.3, automatic HTTPS rewrites, and strict SSL mode are managed as code for the zone.
features.user_visible_behavior: Zone security posture is reviewable and reproducible from Terraform.
verification: terraform plan shows tls_1_3, automatic_https_rewrites, and ssl resources
evidence: 2026-06-05 commit d258429 configured Cloudflare zone security
features.notes: Paired with DNS baseline in terraform/cloudflared.

features.title: Document 1Password-backed Terraform runner contract
features.description: Cloudflare API token, account ID, zone ID, and service-account references are documented without plaintext secrets.
features.user_visible_behavior: Agents can run terraform/cloudflared/tf.sh using op://d3HLPRV references only.
verification: docs/1password-secrets.md lists item names and fields only
features.notes: terraform/cloudflared/tf.sh already uses 1Password reads; docs still missing.

features.title: cloudflared tunnel connector deployment
features.description: Define and deploy a Cloudflare tunnel connector for homelab ingress without committing tunnel secrets.
features.user_visible_behavior: Homelab services can be reached through Cloudflare Tunnel with documented credential references.
verification: tunnel configuration exists under terraform/cloudflared or a documented non-Terraform path
no plaintext tunnel tokens are committed
validation runbook documents read-only tunnel status checks
features.notes: Directory name cloudflared implies this scope; only DNS/zone resources exist today.

features.title: Mesh controller service scaffold
features.description: Scaffold the Cloudflare mesh controller API/service shape that this repo will own.
features.user_visible_behavior: The control-plane service boundary, config inputs, and health checks are visible before live deployment.

features.title: Add GitHub Actions static checks
features.description: CI runs shell, JSON, and Terraform fmt/validate checks without live Cloudflare credentials.
features.user_visible_behavior: Pull requests get fast feedback before any live Cloudflare apply is attempted.
verification: workflow has no live terraform apply step

features.title: Define end-to-end validation runbook
features.description: Document read-only checks for DNS, zone settings, tunnel health, and controller readiness.
features.user_visible_behavior: Operators can prove the Cloudflare control plane is ready before enabling live changes.
verification: runbook separates read-only checks from live apply actions
